DISCOVERY 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT AINA ENTERPRISES, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY AND SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $600.00, PAYABLE WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. WRITTEN ORDER SIGNED AS MODIFIED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM NOAH LEBOWITZ, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED (302).

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT AINA ENTERPRISES, LLC'S MOTION FOR ISSUE AND EVIDENCE SANCTIONS - THE MOTION IS DENIED PROVIDED (1) GET THE LLC REVIVED BY AUGUST 21, 2015 AND IF PLAINTIFF DOES NOT REVIVE ITS LIMITED LIABILITY STATUS BY 8/21, IT IS ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF'S SUBJECT COMPLAINT AGAINST AINA ENTERPRISE LLC IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. AND (2) PAY BY AUGUST 21, 2015, TO DEFENDANT AINA THE MONETARY SANCTIONS PREVIOUSLY ORDERED OF $3,590 PLUS $1,100 IN ADDITIONAL MONETARY SANCTIONS PAYABLE ON AUGUST 31 FOR THE PRESENT MOTION, FOR A TOTAL OF $4,690. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER : MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489 =302/EG

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT AINA ENTERPRISES, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY AND SANCTIONS - THE MOTION IS GRANTED IN PART AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AS WELL AS THE DOCUMENTS REQUESTED BY REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE'NUMBERS 1-7 AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET TWO'NUMBER 8 BY JUNE 10, 2014. ALL OBJECTIONS ARE WAIVED. THE MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. IT APPEARS THAT A FULL AND COMPLETE PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS WILL ANSWER THE SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES. IF, FOLLOWING RECEIPT OF THE DOCUMENTS, DEFENDANT DETERMINES THAT FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES ARE DUE, THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER. IF THAT FAILS TO RESOLVE THE MATTER, THEN DEFENDANT MAY BRING A MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,495.00. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO-TEM: TOM COHEN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Issue And Evidence Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RAVI D. SAHAE OF FLYNN RILEY, TEL. NO. 1-415-461-1000 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MARGARET M. LESNIAK OF THE LAW OFFICES OF CESARI WERNER AND MORIARTY, TEL. NO. 1-650-991-5126 EXT. 29 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT AINA ENTERPRISES, LLC'S Motion For Issue And Evidence Sanctions - The motion is denied provided (1) get the LLC revived by August 21, 2015 and if plaintiff does not revive its limited liability status by 8/21, it is ordered that plaintiff's subject complaint against Aina Enterprise LLC is dismissed with prejudice. and (2) pay by August 21, 2015, to defendant Aina the monetary sanctions previously ordered of $3,590 plus $1,100 in additional monetary sanctions payable on August 31 for the present motion, for a total of $4,690. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg

Appearances: David Tillotson of Flynn Riley Bailey & Pasek LLP telephone number 415-461-1000 for Plaintiff.

The Plaintiff shall respond to the outstanding order within 10-days. Sanctions awarded in the sum of $1,495.00. The moving Party is to prepare the order.

Off Calendar Apr-09-2014 Continued To Nov-10-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Pltf'S Responses To Written Discovery And Sanctions
Off Calendar May-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARGARET M. LESNIAK OF THE LAW OFFICES OF CESARI WERNER AND MORIARTY, TEL. NO. (650) 991-5126 EXT. 29 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS : DEFENDANT AINA ENTERPRISES, LLC's motion To Compel Plaintiff's Responses To Written Discovery And Sanctions -
The Motion is granted in part as follows: Plaintiff shall serve responses to Form Interrogatories as well as the documents requested by Request for Production of Documents, Set One'numbers 1-7 and Request for Production of Documents, Set Two'number 8 by June 10, 2014. All objections are waived. The Motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories is denied without prejudice. It appears that a full and complete production of documents will answer the Special Interrogatories. If, following receipt of the documents, defendant determines that further responses to Special Interrogatories are due, the parties are ordered to meet and confer. If that fails to resolve the matter, then Defendant may bring a motion to compel further responses to Special Interrogatories. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $1,495.00.
